package rulefixtures

// scenario for copy_append_idiom_waste: `dst = append(dst, src...)` when `dst` is known empty and `len(src)` is known
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: info.
type Rule472NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario472Negative(records []Rule472NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
